name: auth-check
description: Reusable middleware workflow. Verifies a JWT bearer token from the Authorization header, validates exp/iss/aud, and stashes the parsed claims at ctx.state.identity for downstream steps to consume. On invalid token, short-circuits with 401 and `stop: true` — the request never reaches the main workflow. Apply via `trigger.http.middleware: ["auth-check"]` or `workflow.middleware: ["auth-check"]`. The `middleware: true` flag at the workflow level marks this as a middleware-only workflow with no trigger of its own.
